    • performFinish

      public boolean performFinish()
      If new profile, create the profile with selected tactics. Else change the tactics list of existing profile. The modification is only in the ITacticProfileCache.
      Specified by:
      performFinish in interface org.eclipse.jface.wizard.IWizard
      Specified by:
      performFinish in class org.eclipse.jface.wizard.Wizard
